title: WF-07: Archived track context pollution prevention — physical move to track/archive/ with script and deny rule updates

tasks.description: Add TRACK_ARCHIVE_DIR constant and all_track_directories() helper to track_schema.py
Update verify_plan_progress.py track_dirs() to use all_track_directories()
Update verify_track_metadata.py main() to use all_track_directories()
Update verify_latest_track_files.py track_dirs() to use all_track_directories()
Update track_registry.py collect_track_metadata() to scan both directories
Update verify_tech_stack_ready.py has_track_dirs() and all_tracks_planned() for both directories
Update /track:archive command to mkdir -p track/archive/ and git mv track dir to track/archive/<id>/
Add deny rules for track/archive/** in .claude/settings.json (Read, Grep, Glob)
Update CLAUDE.md Workspace Map and archive command Behavior section for track/archive/
Update test_track_schema.py: TRACK_ARCHIVE_DIR consistency test for scripts referencing track/archive, and all_track_directories() unit tests
Add archive directory tests in test_track_registry.py and test_verify_scripts.py
Move all existing archived tracks to track/archive/ and run cargo make ci for full validation

summary: Prevent archived track directories from polluting AI search context by physically moving them to track/archive/ and adding Claude Code deny rules.
All verify scripts and registry rendering updated to scan both track/items/ and track/archive/ via a shared helper.
No Rust code changes. Python scripts + command definitions + settings only.
Backward compatible: existing CI validation continues to cover archived tracks.

sections.title: Core Infrastructure
description: Add TRACK_ARCHIVE_DIR constant and all_track_directories() helper to track_schema.py.
This shared helper returns sorted track directories from both track/items/ and track/archive/.

sections.title: Script Updates
description: Update 5 verify/registry scripts to scan both directories via the new helper.

sections.title: Archive Command Update
description: Update /track:archive command definition to add physical move step.
After metadata update, mkdir -p track/archive/ and git mv track/items/<id>/ to track/archive/<id>/.

sections.title: Search Exclusion
description: Add deny rules to .claude/settings.json to block Read/Grep/Glob on track/archive/**.
Verify scripts run via Bash and are unaffected by deny rules.

sections.title: Documentation and Tests
description: Update CLAUDE.md Workspace Map to include track/archive/.
Add unit tests for all_track_directories() and integration tests for archive directory scanning.

sections.title: Integration Validation
description: Physically move all 15 existing archived tracks to track/archive/.
Run cargo make ci to validate all scripts, views, and tests pass.
